Title: Purpose
Recording Learning delivery monitoring c: To provide a list of the valid Learning delivery monitoring codes, to enable providers to successfully make ILR data returns

Title: Intended audience
Recording Learning delivery monitoring c: This is a technical document aimed at those responsible for making data returns; data specification implementation; and MI system design (including MI managers, commercial software suppliers and own software writers)

Title: The following codes are those authorised for use in the Learning Delivery Funding and Monitoring fields
If you are involved in a National project or pilot, you will be instructed which code to use, by the team responsible for running the project or pilot.
